creator: daniel.tihanyi@tetragir.com
text:
Created attachment 230204
Rundeck 3.4.8 Update diff

This is an update for Rundeck 3.4.8.
Release notes for Rundeck 3.4.5: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_4_x/version-3.4.5.html
Release notes for Rundeck 3.4.6: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_4_x/version-3.4.6.html
Release notes for Rundeck 3.4.7: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_4_x/version-3.4.7.html (including preliminary, but not final log4j vulnerability fix)
Release notes for Rundeck 3.4.8: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_4_x/version-3.4.8.html (including final log4j vulnerability fix for CVE-2021-44228 and CVE-2021-45046)

Also pet portclippy
